feedback.technicalIssues: Most of them took a full 2 minutes to start playing at all, even after hitting Enter. I had to actually click the screen with my mouse for it to start, even though we weren't supposed to do that.
feedback.confusingParts: Several of the games were really frustrating.
feedback.suggestions: Make the games actually work, make the game screens not cover the directions and text.
feedback.funCriteria: How well I did, whether it worked or not.
